markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize billing RFC and review launch readiness.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Billing RFC Approved:** The billing RFC is approved with two key changes: process webhooks inline to preserve event order and update the `workspace.pricing_plan` in the webhook handler to apply new feature limits post-payment.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [**Logo Override is a Blocker:** Incorrect BrandFetch logos for key customers (e.g., Cloud) are a launch blocker, as they erode trust and prevent demos. A manual override feature is the agreed-upon fix.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [**Silent Workflow Failures:** The "Basic Research" Temporal workflow is failing silently, causing an empty onboarding description for `meta.com` and an infinite loading spinner in the admin panel. This is a critical bug requiring immediate investigation.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [**Final Architecture Tasks:** Jose will complete the final two pre-launch architecture tasks: fixing subcategory charts and de-duplicating brands.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)

## Topics

### Billing RFC Review

  - [**Webhook Processing:**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
      - [**Problem:** The RFC's proposed inline webhook processing could cause race conditions if multiple events are processed in parallel.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
      - [**Solution:** Proceed with inline processing. Stripe's retry mechanism provides a safety net, and a future, more robust solution (e.g., sorting by timestamp, using SolidIQ concurrency keys) is out of scope for now.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
      - [**Refinement:** Delegate processing logic to a PORO to keep the controller clean.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Pricing Plan Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
      - [**Problem:** The RFC's `handle_checkout_completed` webhook handler does not update the `workspace.pricing_plan` in our database.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
      - [**Solution:** Update the plan in the webhook handler to apply new feature limits immediately after payment succeeds.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Use `PricingPlan.publicly_available.find_by(stripe_price_id: ...)` to find the correct plan.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Environment Handling:** Use conditional logic in the `stripe_price_id` method to manage different IDs for production vs. sandbox environments.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Gem vs. Custom Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [Estevão will evaluate the `pay` gem as a faster alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Risk:** A gem may lack the flexibility for future "fancy" subscription features, potentially requiring a fork.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [**Guidance:** If using the gem, implement a `workspace.owner` method to abstract the concept of an owner, making future changes easier.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

### Launch Readiness & Bug Review

  - [**Logo Fetching Issues (BrandFetch):**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
      - [**Problem:** BrandFetch returns incorrect or missing logos for key brands (e.g., a random person for "Ask Cody," no logo for "Cloud").](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** BrandFetch struggles with domains that redirect (e.g., `cloud.com` → `cloud.ai`).](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Impact:** This is a launch blocker. It erodes user trust and prevents demos, as customers fixate on the incorrect logo.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [**Solution:** Implement a manual override in the admin panel to upload correct logos to S3.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [**Silent Workflow Failures:**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
      - [**Problem:** The "Basic Research" Temporal workflow is failing silently.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
      - [**Symptoms:**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
          - [Onboarding for `meta.com` yields an empty description.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
          - [The admin panel's brand research feature gets stuck in an infinite loading state.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
      - [**Cause:** The UI does not handle Temporal workflow failures gracefully.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
      - [**Urgency:** Investigate immediately. Temporal logs have a short lookback period (a few days).](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Jose's Progress:**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Completed the "competitor changes backfill" ticket.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Created two non-blocking "Stabilize Week" tickets:](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
          - ["Switching workspaces requires a refresh."](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
          - ["Prompt count meaning is not clear."](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
      - [Currently fixing subcategory overview charts to filter data by a workspace's specific prompt subset.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [Next: De-duplicate brands, the final pre-launch architecture task.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [**Estevão's Progress:**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [Completed minor onboarding fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [Focused on the billing RFC.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Will address remaining onboarding/competitor tasks before starting billing implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

      - [Investigate the `meta.com` onboarding failure.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [Complete the subcategory chart fix.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [Begin the brand de-duplication task.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [Confirm the "suggested competitors" PR is working as intended.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [Verify the logo override is a launch blocker with Daniel and Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
      - [Investigate the silent "Basic Research" workflow failures using Temporal logs.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
      - [Create a blocker ticket for the manual logo override feature.](https://fathom.video/share/iFx8-mczzzHBQx5V6rux3bhErkz51sFD?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
